description: Market Data Features - Real-time Deriv.com volatility indices (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100) market overview with prices and trends

userStories.title: Update MarketOverview with real-time prices
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see real-time market prices for all volatility indices.
acceptanceCriteria: Update MarketOverview to fetch from GET /markets/overview
Display all 5 markets: V10, V25, V50, V75, V100
Display current price with real-time updates
Add visual flash effect when price updates
Subscribe to market_update WebSocket events for instant updates
Verify in browser that markets display correctly
userStories.notes: Implemented - MarketOverview now fetches from GET /markets/overview, displays all 5 volatility indices with real-time prices via WebSocket and 3-second polling, includes flash effects, loading skeleton, error state with retry, 24h high/low, and market status indicators

userStories.title: Create MarketDetailModal component
userStories.description: As a trader, I need detailed view of a single market.
acceptanceCriteria: Display current price with large font
Display price change percentage with color coding
Verify in browser that modal displays correctly

userStories.title: Add trend indicators to market cards
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see market trend at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Add trend indicator badge to each market card
Display trend as: BULLISH, BEARISH, NEUTRAL
Add small sparkline chart showing recent price movement
Verify in browser that trends display correctly
